name: omideno7-meetings-react
description: OmideNo7 Meetings — Vite + React + TypeScript conversion starter

scripts.pwa:check: echo 'Check manifest.webmanifest, sw.js, icons and install page'
scripts.deploy:preview: npm run build && npm run preview
scripts.deploy:vercel: npm run build && echo 'Upload or connect this project to Vercel'
scripts.deploy:netlify: npm run build && echo 'Deploy dist folder to Netlify'
